name: Stick War 2: Kaizo
description: Gear up and fight against one of the most powerful enemies in Stick War history in "Stick War 2: Kaizo"! You have new upgrades on your side, but so do they... Are you up for the ultimate challenge?
developers:
Mod By: Stick War 2 Custom Mods Developers: Dyzqy and ShadowEmpire.
Special thanks to: TheDescendant(ShadowEmpire).
additionalCredits:
s07 for playtesting (suffering) an early version.
T. Takemoto for starting the Kaizo trend with Kaizo Mario World in 2007.
